content.query:
SELECT distinct
servZips.Branch
,servZips.ZipCode
,CAST(zonda.[Total_Households] as INT) as [Total_Households]
,CAST(Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index AS DECIMAL (5, 2)) as [Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zipPerf.GrossSalesAmount
,zipPerf.RawLeadCount
,zipPerf.SoldLeadCount
,zonda.[MSA]
,zonda.[State]
,zonda.[County]
,zonda.[City]
,zonda.[Median_Home_Price]
,zonda.[Median_Year_Built]
FROM
(
    SELECT distinct [Zip Code] as ZipCode,[Final Assigned Branch] as Branch FROM [ODS].[REF_MKT_GEOFENCE] where OpCo = 'MAC'
) servZips
left join (
    SELECT
    [Zip]
    ,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
    ,count(lds.LeadID) as RawLeadCount
    ,sum(case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldLeadCount
    FROM 
    [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
    ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    WHERE
    lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    and lds.[OperatingCompany] = 'MAC'
    group BY
    [Zip]
) zipPerf
on servZips.ZipCode = zipPerf.Zip
left join [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX] zonda
on servZips.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
order by
servZips.Branch
,Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index desc
,[Total_Households] desc
